title.en: Ye Tian met with this guest here.

content.en:
Outside the supreme hall of the human race, the headquarters of the Heavenly Pavilion in the Tianlan Giant City.

Ye Tian met with this guest here.

Because guests cannot enter the Supreme Hall of the Terran Race, unless they are active members of the Supreme Hall of the Terran Race, it is difficult for even a former highness like the Undead War Lord to enter the Supreme Hall of the Terran Race.

"Yundan Juggernaut!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised when he saw this acquaintance, and he didn't know why the Yundan Juggernaut came to him.

It stands to reason that their deal has been completed, and the Yundan Juggernaut will not be idle to visit him, there must be other things.

"Master Yundan, I don't know what you're looking for me?"

Ye Tian asked.

Yundan Juggernaut hurriedly said, "Your Highness Wanfa, our Danta has learned that there are ten reincarnation quotas in the Six Realms Reincarnation Tower. It takes a huge amount of resources for the Six Realms Reincarnation Pagoda to help a person reincarnate, even the Supreme Hall of the Human Race does not have too many places at one time, and the number of places allocated to various supreme forces is even less, which is not enough at all. "

As for Yun Dan's words, Ye Tian agreed.

Among the human race, there are too many people who want to be reincarnated.

Reincarnation is not a reincarnation experience, the reincarnation experience is a fictional reincarnation world, which is actually the reincarnation of people's consciousness, and the ontology is kept in the six reincarnation towers.

And reincarnation is the real reincarnation, leaving everything behind, leaving only memories for reincarnation, and living a new life.

Some cultivators who are at the peak of the galaxy level and have a short lifespan want to be reincarnated the most, in this way, they have the hope of ascending to the cosmic god level.

Even if the reincarnation is unlucky and the talent is not high, as long as the forces behind it find the reincarnated person, they will start cultivating and improving their talents from a young age, and it is not difficult to improve their talents with the ability of the supreme forces.

Because the lower the cultivation level, the easier it is to improve the talent, and the price paid is not large, if you wait to become a galaxy-level powerhouse, and then improve the cultivation talent, the price is too great, and it may not be successful.

In addition, many strong people have taken the wrong path, which makes it difficult for them to progress in cultivation, and if they are reincarnated, they can hope to become children of the universe, or even children of the universe at the level of eternity.

So, once reincarnated, everyone can become a true genius.

But although the Six Paths of Reincarnation Tower is a supreme treasure, if you want to reincarnate a person, the price paid is very high, so the Supreme Hall of the Terran Race cannot let a large number of Terran strong people reincarnate, and can only give a small number of strong people to reincarnate.

"Danta wants a spot?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Yes!" Yun Dan dominated: "Danta wants three places, one of them is what I want, my thirteenth wife, that is, Qinghan's mother, her talent is limited, although I try my best to improve her cultivation talent, but her talent potential is too low, I paid a great price, I still can't let her have a Yu-level cultivation talent, her lifespan is not very much." So, I want her to be reincarnated and cultivate again. "

"Yundan Master, you should know how precious the reincarnation quota is, even if I don't need to be reincarnated, but my relatives and friends, some also need to be reincarnated. So, what price will Danta pay?" Ye Tiandao.

"What does His Highness Wanfa want?"

The Yundan Juggernaut asked.

Ye Tian pondered, Danta, as one of the supreme-level forces, although its strength is not as good as that of other supreme-level forces, its financial resources are undoubtedly the most abundant, and there are many good things.

"I want ten Origin Divine Pills!"

Ye Tian said.

"What, the Origin Divine Pill !!!"

Yun Dan was shocked.

He never expected that Ye Tian's appetite would be so big, and he would actually want the Origin Divine Pill of their Dan Tower.

"Your Highness Wanfa, do you know what a precious elixir the Origin Divine Pill is, the Immortal Golden Pill is not even as valuable as one ten-thousandth of the Origin Divine Pill, you still want ten !! at once"

Yun Dan Juggernaut's face changed drastically.

"Of course I know what the Origin Divine Pill is. Ye Tian said with a smile, "The Origin Divine Pill was refined by Danta using special means, and as for what the material is, the outside world still doesn't know." The Origin Divine Pill is even extremely important to the Universe Gods and Masters, it can make a person's comprehension increase countless times in a short period of time, and many Universe Gods and Masters are eager to use the Origin Divine Pill to comprehend the great supernatural powers, laws, and supreme secret arts. It is precisely because the Origin Divine Pill is precious that I want the Origin Divine Pill!"

"Your Highness Wanfa, to tell you the truth, even I have only been able to obtain the reward of an Origin Divine Pill for countless years, which is a supreme elixir that only the Supreme can refine. With only three reincarnation quotas, it's not worth 10 Origin Divine Pills at all!" said Yun Dan Juggernaut.

"What about the five?"

Ye Tian said.

He also knew that the Origin Divine Pill was extremely precious, but he didn't know what the bottom line of the Danta was, so he could only test it again and again.

Ye Tian talked with the Yundan Juggernaut for a long time, but in the end, the Yundan Juggernaut did not give an answer, only said that he wanted to go back to the Danta to discuss with other high-level officials, and even needed to consult the tower master of the Danta!

In the blink of an eye, ten days have passed.

The Yundan Juggernaut came to Tianlan Giant City again and talked to Ye Tian again.

"Your Highness Wanfa, Danta has replied, Danta is willing to take out 4 Origin Divine Pills in exchange for your three places, how about it?"

Yun Dan Juggernaut said.

"Good!"

Ye Tian agreed.

This deal is very cost-effective, after all, reincarnation is a risky thing, and he really doesn't need reincarnation, and his relatives don't need it.

If the talent of his relatives is poor, he can take the talent of others and give it to them in the future, and there is no need to let them be reincarnated at all.

Therefore, for him, ten reincarnation places can only be used for trading.

Now, with three places, he has traded 4 Origin Divine Pills that are extremely important to him, and this transaction is too cost-effective.

Next, under the witness of the high-level leaders of the Supreme Hall of the Human Race, Ye Tian and Danta completed the transaction.

Danta won three places, while Ye Tian received four Origin Divine Pills.

Subsequently, Ye Tian immediately retreated and used the Origin Divine Pill.

Cultivation room.

Ye Tian took out an Origin Divine Pill, the Origin Divine Pill was golden, but there was a faint colorful light mixed with the gold, and there was even a world inside, incomparably mystical and magical.

Immediately, Ye Tian swallowed the Origin Divine Pill in one gulp.

Rumble!!!!

The energy of the Origin Divine Pill poured into Ye Tian's immortal soul.

In an instant, Ye Tian's comprehension was improved countless times, and countless spiritual lights flashed.

Then, Ye Tian began to comprehend the Great Divine Power of the Five Elements Divine Wheel.

In the past, it was difficult to continue to improve the Great Divine Power of the Five Elements Divine Wheel, and it has always been in the introductory stage, and it is too difficult and difficult to improve a Great Divine Power, and it takes endless years of enlightenment to hope for improvement.

But now, Ye Tian has shortened the time of this enlightenment infinitely.

I don't know how long it has been, when the energy of this Origin Divine Pill was exhausted, Ye Tian opened his eyes excitedly.

"It's done!"

At this time, Ye Tian had successfully raised the Great Divine Power of the Five Elements Divine Wheel to the Xiaocheng realm.

From the entry level to the Xiaocheng realm, the power of the Five Elements Divine Wheel has increased by more than one or two times, but by five or six times or even more.

"The effect of the Origin Divine Pill is too good, continue to use it!"

Ye Tian swallowed another Origin Divine Pill, this time he did not go to comprehend the Five Elements Divine Wheel, but to comprehend the Divine Spear of the Hell Divine Sky, a great spatial divine power.
